languages.text: "На люльке вниз. Окажетесь прямиком у логова шипастой сволочи". {n}Полковник тяжело вздыхает, с присвистом выпуская воздух из легких. Взгляд его зеленых глаз, подернутый пеленой ярости, проходит по вашему лицу и внезапно смягчается.{/n} "Если желаете помереть за просто так, держать не буду, можете отправляться хоть сейчас. Но если готовы снизойти до совета от здешнего, буду ждать вас у себя".

traits.locale_text: "На люльке вниз. Окажетесь прямиком у логова шипастой сволочи". {n}Полковник тяжело вздыхает, с присвистом выпуская воздух из легких. Взгляд его зеленых глаз, подернутый пеленой ярости, проходит по вашему лицу и внезапно смягчается.{/n} "Если желаете помереть за просто так, держать не буду, можете отправляться хоть сейчас. Но если готовы снизойти до совета от здешнего, буду ждать вас у себя".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."
languages.original_text: "На люльке вниз. Окажетесь прямиком у логова шипастой сволочи". {n}Полковник тяжело вздыхает, с присвистом выпуская воздух из легких. Взгляд его зеленых глаз, подернутый пеленой ярости, проходит по вашему лицу и внезапно смягчается.{/n} "Если желаете помереть за просто так, держать не буду, можете отправляться хоть сейчас. Но если готовы снизойти до совета от здешнего, буду ждать вас у себя".

traits.locale_text: "Take the cradle down. It'll put you straight at that barbed bastard's lair." {n}The Colonel exhales heavily, with the air whistling from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But you have some humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

"Take the cradle down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

"That is an order." {n}The colonel turns to you again, but you can see the thunder in his eyes.{/n} "There you have it, the welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, disperse!" {n}At Batoshski's order, the soldiers begin to disperse to their posts, albeit with some reluctance.{/n} "I won't stop you from getting yourself killed, so you can use the cradle to go down below. But come see me first — perhaps I can give you some advice that will help." {n}The colonel turns and walks away.{/n}

"Take the cradle down. It'll put you straight at that barbed bastard's lair." {n}The Colonel exhales heavily, with the air whistling from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But you have some humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

"Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

languages.text: 「命令だ」{n}大佐は再びあなたに目を向けるが、彼の目は雷のように怒り狂っていた。{/n}「これで終わりだ、歓迎式は終わった。連隊、解散！」{n}バトシュスキーの命令で、兵士たちは渋々ながらも、それぞれの任務に向かう。{/n}「お前が死んでしまうのを止められない。だから、ゆりかごを使って下へ降りていってもいい。でも、まず私に見に来てくれ。助かるかもしれないアドバイスをできるかもしれない。」{n}大佐は振り返って去っていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: "That is an order." {n}The colonel turns to you again, but you can see the thunder in his eyes.{/n} "There you have it, the welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, disperse!" {n}At Batoshski's order, the soldiers begin to disperse to their posts, albeit with some reluctance.{/n} "I won't stop you from getting yourself killed, so you can use the cradle to go down below. But come see me first — perhaps I can give you some advice that will help." {n}The colonel turns and walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「命令だ」{n}大佐は再びあなたに目を向けるが、彼の目は雷のように怒り狂っていた。{n}「これで終わりだ、歓迎式は終わった。連隊、解散！」{n}バトシュスキーの命令で、兵士たちは渋々ながらも、それぞれの任務に向かう。{n}「お前が死んでしまうのを止められない。だから、ゆりかごを使って下へ降りていってもいい。でも、まず私に見に来てくれ。助かるかもしれないアドバイスをできるかもしれない。」{n}大佐は振り返って去っていく。

languages.text: "Fahrt mit dem Aufzug nach unten. So gelangt Ihr direkt zum Hort dieses dornigen Bastards." {n}Der Colonel atmet schwer aus und lässt die Luft aus seinen Lungen entweichen. Seine grünen, von einem Schleier aus Zorn getrübten Augen huschen über dein Gesicht, ehe sich seine Miene plötzlich aufhellt.{/n} "Wenn Ihr Euer Leben für nichts wegwerfen wollt, werde ich Euch nicht aufhalten und Ihr könnt jetzt gehen. Aber wenn Ihr genügend Demut besitzt, um auf einen Einheimischen zu hören, findet Ihr mich in meinem Quartier."
languages.original_text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

Seine grünen, von einem Schleier aus Zorn getrübten Augen huschen über dein Gesicht, ehe sich seine Miene plötzlich aufhellt.{/n} "Wenn Ihr Euer Leben für nichts wegwerfen wollt, werde ich Euch nicht aufhalten und Ihr könnt jetzt gehen. Aber wenn Ihr genügend Demut besitzt, um auf einen Einheimischen zu hören, findet Ihr mich in meinem Quartier."

"Zerstört die Wiege. So gelangt Ihr direkt zum Hort dieses dornigen Bastards." {n}Der Colonel atmet schwer aus und lässt die Luft aus seinen Lungen entweichen. Seine grünen, von einem Schleier aus Zorn getrübten Augen huschen über dein Gesicht, ehe sich seine Miene plötzlich aufhellt.{/n} "Wenn Ihr Euer Leben für nichts wegwerfen wollt, werde ich Euch nicht aufhalten und Ihr könnt jetzt gehen. Aber wenn Ihr genügend Demut besitzt, um auf einen Einheimischen zu hören, findet Ihr mich in meinem Quartier."

languages.text: « Descendez avec l'ascenseur. Il vous déposera devant l'antre de cette horreur couverte d'épines. » {n}Le colonel expire bruyamment, et l'air expulsé de ses poumons produit un sifflement. Ses yeux verts, voilés par la rage, vous dévisagent farouchement avant de se radoucir subitement.{/n} « Si vous voulez sacrifier votre vie en pure perte, allez-y tout de suite, je ne vous en empêcherai pas. Mais si vous êtes assez humble pour écouter les conseils d'un homme qui connaît la région comme sa poche, je vous attendrai dans mes quartiers. »
languages.original_text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

Il vous déposera devant l'antre de cette horreur couverte d'épines. » {n}Le colonel expire bruyamment, et l'air expulsé de ses poumons produit un sifflement. Ses yeux verts, voilés par la rage, vous dévisagent farouchement avant de se radoucir subitement.{/n} « Si vous voulez sacrifier votre vie en pure perte, allez-y tout de suite, je ne vous en empêcherai pas. Mais si vous êtes assez humble pour écouter les conseils d'un homme qui connaît la région comme sa poche, je vous attendrai dans mes quartiers. »

« Descendez avec la nacelle. Elle vous déposera devant l'antre de cette horreur couverte d'épines. » {n}Le colonel expire bruyamment, et l'air expulsé de ses poumons produit un sifflement. Ses yeux verts, voilés par la rage, vous dévisagent farouchement avant de se radoucir subitement.{/n} « Si vous voulez sacrifier votre vie en pure perte, allez-y tout de suite, je ne vous en empêcherai pas. Mais si vous êtes assez humble pour écouter les conseils d'un homme qui connaît la région comme sa poche, je vous attendrai dans mes quartiers. »

languages.text: «Baje en el ascensor. le dejará junto a la guarida de ese malnacido espinoso». {n}El coronel suspira profundamente con un siseo. Sus verdes ojos, nublados por la ira, recorren tu cara antes de suavizarse repentinamente.{/n} «Si quiere desperdiciar en vano su vida, no le detendré, puede ir ya mismo. Pero si tiene la suficiente humildad como paar aceptar el consejo de un lugareño, le esperaré en mis aposentos».
languages.original_text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

Sus verdes ojos, nublados por la ira, recorren tu cara antes de suavizarse repentinamente.{/n} «Si quiere desperdiciar en vano su vida, no le detendré, puede ir ya mismo. Pero si tiene la suficiente humildad como paar aceptar el consejo de un lugareño, le esperaré en mis aposentos».

«Baje en la cuna. le dejará junto a la guarida de ese malnacido espinoso». {n}El coronel suspira profundamente con un siseo. Sus verdes ojos, nublados por la ira, recorren tu cara antes de suavizarse repentinamente.{/n} «Si quiere desperdiciar en vano su vida, no le detendré, puede ir ya mismo. Pero si tiene la suficiente humildad como paar aceptar el consejo de un lugareño, le esperaré en mis aposentos».

languages.text: "Asansörü indirin. Sizi o dikenli piç kurusunun ininin tam dışına çıkaracaktır." {n}Albay derin bir nefes veriyor. Hava, ciğerlerinden tıslayarak çıkıyor. Öfke perdesiyle gölgelenmiş yeşil gözleri, yüzünü tarayıp aniden yumuşuyor.{/n} "Hayatınızı bir hiç uğruna harcamak istiyorsanız sizi durdurmam. İstediğiniz zaman gidebilirsiniz. Fakat bir yerlinin tavsiyesine kulak verecek kadar alçakgönüllüyseniz de sizi karargâhımda bekliyor olacağım."
languages.original_text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."

Fakat bir yerlinin tavsiyesine kulak verecek kadar alçakgönüllüyseniz de sizi karargâhımda bekliyor olacağım."

"Beşiği indirin. Sizi o dikenli piç kurusunun ininin tam dışına çıkaracaktır." {n}Albay derin bir nefes veriyor. Hava, ciğerlerinden tıslayarak çıkıyor. Öfke perdesiyle gölgelenmiş yeşil gözleri, yüzünü tarayıp aniden yumuşuyor.{/n} "Hayatınızı bir hiç uğruna harcamak istiyorsanız sizi durdurmam. İstediğiniz zaman gidebilirsiniz. Fakat bir yerlinin tavsiyesine kulak verecek kadar alçakgönüllüyseniz de sizi karargâhımda bekliyor olacağım."

languages.text: “乘升降机下去。它会直接把您送到那浑身长刺的怪物老巢门口。”{n}上校重重呼出一口气，肺里的空气嘶嘶作响。他那双被怒火蒙住的绿眼睛扫过你的脸，然后突然缓和下来。{/n}“如果您想白白送死，我不拦您，您现在就可以走。但如果您还算谦逊，愿意听听本地人的建议，那就来我的住处找我。”
languages.original_text: "Take the lift down. It'll put you right outside that thorny bastard's lair." {n}The colonel exhales heavily, the air hissing from his lungs. His green eyes, clouded by a veil of rage, rake over your face before suddenly softening.{/n} "If you want to throw your life away for nothing, I won't stop you, you can leave now. But if you have enough humility to take advice from a local, I'll be waiting for you at my quarters."
